name: Variable Rate Nitrogen Application — North Quarter Section 14
description: Reference ADAPT Standard v2.0.0 WorkRecord demonstrating all seven AgDataBOM ContextItems. Variable-rate nitrogen prescription applied to a 160-acre corn field. Governed under DataBOM_PrescriptionDelivery purpose with agronomist-authored prescription.

contextItems.description: AgCISP custodial pipeline — Pinnacle Systems Group LLC acting as data custodian under AgDataBOM Data Custodian Agreement PSG-AGMT-2026-001
Prescription data reflects agronomist intellectual work product and producer field variability. Elevated above PRODUCER_SENSITIVE due to prescription IP.
Prescription delivery to field equipment task controller. Governance governs the prescription record; not the equipment command stream.
Lender and Regulator excluded. Prescription IP belongs to agronomist. Producer has operational access. No secondary commercial use authorized.
Seven-year retention per USDA FSA crop records requirement. ISO 8601 duration format.
contextItems.regulatoryBasis: 7 CFR Part 1400 — USDA FSA farm records retention

contextItems.description: Data originator: ZTI device serial 001 installed on John Deere 8R tractor operated by Kevin Kenney Farm LLC. Hardware attestation via ATECC608B secure element.
AgCISP git ledger custody anchor. Commit hash populated by AgCISP pipeline post-ATECC608B attestation. Hyperledger Fabric anchor pending Phase I deployment.

operations.description: Variable rate liquid nitrogen application per agronomist prescription zones

contextItems.note: Operation-level purpose confirmation inherits WorkRecord governance

spatialData.privacyNote: Boundary represents masked bounding box per ZTI edge-privacy filter. Raw field boundary withheld per LB525 Section 4 location data provisions.

aggatewayRefs.wg35: AgGateway WG35 DataBOM Stewardship Metadata Working Committee

legalRefs.lb525: Nebraska LB525 Agricultural Data Privacy Act, signed April 14 2026, effective January 1 2027
